description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the enemy with the highest Speed for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> while ignoring Resilience, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Pureblood's Dominion</color> to all allies at the start of battle. These effects cannot be removed.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 전투 시작 시 속도가 가장 빠른 적 한 명에게 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다. 아군 전체에게는 <color=#28d9ed>선혈의 영역</color>을 부여합니다. 이 효과들은 해제되지 않습니다.\n\n(액티브 효과) 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、最もスピードが高い敵単体に効果抵抗を無視する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。味方全体には<color=#28d9ed>鮮血の領域</color>を付与する。これらの効果は解除されない。\n\n(アクティブ効果)敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh:
(被动效果) 战斗开始时,使速度最高的1名敌人无视目标的效果抵抗,并造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>鲜血领域</color>效果。这些效果不会被
解除。

(主动效果) 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks them. Deals increased damage and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가하고 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: スキル使用時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合ダメージがUPし、スキル使用後<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 使用技能时,解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则使伤害提升,并在使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Darkness

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Increases Damage Dealt by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

伤害量提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
